raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box is centered on the tabletop and reachable by both arms. The left and right sides of the box have enough clearance from the table edges and other objects (none adjacent) for both end-effectors to make simultaneous lateral contact. The robot can apply balanced inward normal forces to prevent slipping while lifting a 30x30x30 cm box (too large for claw grasp).",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors with symmetric lateral support and lifted off the table, with the box stabilized in the air."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box is centered on the tabletop and reachable by both arms. The left and right sides of the box have enough clearance from the table edges and other objects (none adjacent) for both end-effectors to make simultaneous lateral contact. The robot can apply balanced inward normal forces to prevent slipping while lifting a 30x30x30 cm box (too large for claw grasp).
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held by both end-effectors with symmetric lateral support and lifted off the table, with the box stabilized in the air.
